S2_original.name: S2 original: 3-factor L/S
S2_original.description: Momentum + low-vol + reversal composite, L/S top vs bottom quintile, dollar-neutral.
S2_original.verdict: FAILED — reversal cancels momentum; L/S in tech is broken

S2a_2f_ls.name: S2a: 2-factor L/S
S2a_2f_ls.description: Drop reversal; momentum + low-vol composite, L/S top vs bottom quintile.
S2a_2f_ls.verdict: FAILED — short side concentration in tech is the real problem

S2b_2f_lo.name: S2b: 2-factor long-only
S2b_2f_lo.description: Drop reversal AND short side; momentum + low-vol composite, long top quartile, no overlay.
S2b_2f_lo.verdict: Works (0.92 Sharpe) but -50% MaxDD; needs overlay

S2c_2f_lo_macro.name: S2c: 2-factor long-only + macro overlay
S2c_2f_lo_macro.description: Add macro overlay to S2b; momentum + low-vol, long top quartile, gross exposure scaled by macro composite.
S2c_2f_lo_macro.verdict: VIABLE — Sharpe 0.95, MaxDD -27%. Trades 3pp/yr CAGR for hair of Sharpe vs S1.

S1_ref.name: S1: Macro-Overlay Tech (pure momentum)
S1_ref.description: Pure 12-1m momentum, long top quartile, gross exposure scaled by macro composite.
S1_ref.verdict: PITCHED — highest CAGR (16.1%) and Calmar (0.57); cleanest narrative
